steps.title: Spot the contrast in isolation speed
steps.content: Selenium was isolated the same year it was discovered, while molybdenum was isolated three years after discovery. The passage sets up an explicit contrast between how quickly these two elements were isolated.

steps.title: Apply the contrast signal
steps.content: ”By contrast” directly signals the opposition between the two timelines — selenium's immediate isolation versus molybdenum's delayed isolation. Thus signals consequence, Similarly signals equivalence, and For instance signals exemplification — none of which match this contrast. That matches choice A — A is correct.
